refnamediv.refpurpose: Prepend data to an existing item

refentry.refsect1:
&reftitle.description;
boolMemcache::prepend stringkey mixedvar intflag intexpire
boolmemcache_prepend Memcachememcache stringkey mixedvar intflag intexpire
Memcache::prepend adds the value of var to the beginning of the item stored under key on the memcached server. The item must already exist on the server, otherwise the operation fails and &false; is returned.
This operation is only supported by the text (ASCII) protocol; it is not available when the binary protocol is in use.

&reftitle.parameters;
key
The key of the item to prepend the data to.
var
The data to prepend to the stored item. Strings and integers are stored as is, other types are stored serialized.
flag
Use MEMCACHE_COMPRESSED to store the item compressed (uses zlib).
expire
Expiration time of the item. If it's equal to zero, the item will never expire. You can also use Unix timestamp or a number of seconds starting from current time, but in the latter case the number of seconds may not exceed 2592000 (30 days).
